news.title: Updates: Attackers Were Trailing Suvendu Adhikari's Aide, Says BJP Leader's Brother
news.excerpt: Suvendu Adhikari was not with Chandranath Rath at the time of the incident, the BJP leader's brother Dibyendu Adhikari told NDTV.

news.title: "Unfair Criticism": Karti Chidambaram On DMK's "Backstabber" Remark

news.title: Rubio to visit India for bilateral talks; Quad Foreign Ministers’ meeting May-end
news.excerpt: Rubio will hold talks with Jaishankar and Ajit Doval, and call on Prime Minister Modi, in discussions that are expected to set the course for India-U.
